f2p_added: failed registerProvider does not persist invalid streamSimple config
failed registerProvider does not remove existing provider models
bindCore ignores invalid queued registrations and reports extension error
notes: Issue #2431 invalid extension provider crash. Canonical patch adds 3 new behavioral `it()`/`test()` blocks across two test files: model-registry.test.ts (`failed registerProvider does not persist invalid streamSimple config` and `failed registerProvider does not remove existing provider models`) and extensions-runner.test.ts (`bindCore ignores invalid queued registrations and reports extension error`). All three are pure behavioral assertions: validate-before-mutate semantics (registry state unchanged after failed register), error reporting carries extensionPath. SUBSET note from pre-flag (7-of-9 upstream files) — the JSON shows 7 files_changed; if upstream PR has 9 files we're missing 2, but the 3 tests captured are sufficient F2P signal for the validate-before-mutate behavior described in the instruction. Replaced FAIL_TO_PASS=[] with the 3 test names. _fidelity: exact, no warnings.
